JOIN OUR TEAM
CAREER OPPORTUNITIES
Join the Imagine Canada team

Our cause is social good in Canada.

WHO WE ARE

Imagine Canada is a national charitable organization whose cause is Canada's charitable and nonprofit sector.

We support the sector through research and advocacy, and offer programs and resources that help strengthen charities.

We believe that the sector plays an essential role in Canadian society. We work to strengthen and support Canadian charities and nonprofits so they may better serve and engage their communities, both domestically and internationally.
OUR CULTURE AND VALUES

We believe that charities and nonprofits play an essential role in Canadian society by helping those in need, enhancing quality of life, building knowledge, developing public policy, and contributing toward economic prosperity.

Imagine Canada offers meaningful opportunities to make an impact in Canadian communities. We are currently actioning an anti-racism and anti-oppression roadmap that embeds equity into our processes, human resources, and mission area programs. We are committed to fostering a culture that exemplifies our employee values:

 

Accountability:  We are mindful of our responsibilities to each other, and make commitments and decisions grounded in trust, transparency, and integrity.
